description: Weekly, grouped, and deliberately patient: minimumReleaseAge mirrors bunfig.toml's 3-day
install window, so a compromised or broken publish is caught by the ecosystem before a
bot PR proposes it here. Covers bun deps (bun.lock), pub deps (pubspec.yaml), GitHub
Actions, the .bun-version pin (native bun-version manager), and the Flutter pin in
pubspec environment.flutter (custom manager below). llama.cpp deliberately floats and
must never appear here — see apps/server/AGENTS.md.

customManagers.description: The exact Flutter pin in environment.flutter — CI and pub get both enforce it.
